---
name: Whole Thesis - Structure and Readiness
description: Compact structural benchmark for full-thesis architecture and examiner-facing readiness.
applyTo: manuscript/**/*.tex,venue/requirements.md,venue/benchmark-requirements.md,tasks/status.md
---

# Whole Thesis - Structure and Readiness

## Scope
- Benchmark structure and thesis-role only (not topic correctness).

## Expected Thesis Shape (rough signals)
- Recognizable flow: Introduction → Background → Methodology → Results → Discussion → Conclusion.
- Aim/RQs visible early and answered late.
- Balanced chapter economy (no obviously starved synthesis/closure).

## Must Include in Assessment
- Architecture clarity and chapter purpose.
- Navigation quality (TOC/headings/contracts).
- Synthesis beyond paper listing.
- High-impact structural risks and fix priority.

## Should Not Include
- Topic-specific technical judgment.
- Decorative advice not tied to examiner risk.

## Output (compact)
1. Verdict: Strong / Adequate / Weak / At Risk.
2. Dense summary.
3. Strengths (top 5).
4. Weaknesses (top 5).
5. Missing core vs optional structure elements.
6. Top 10 fixes first (code block: issue | why | first fix).

## Constraints
- Do not rewrite chapters.
- Do not invent claims/evidence/citations.
